script: TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-graph-token.sh 2>&1); echo "token-len=${#TOKEN}"; echo; echo '===== Try install for Jesus with Yoo delegated token ====='; for B in '000163d9-3720-403c-a149-572d07a22c3c|2c4a8184-13db-4d42-a65e-5def7414ce2c|Jesus' 'c94b30a3-9286-44e2-8b80-308635bcbfdd|ee80c194-7458-488f-bd68-60c0611daf82|Cameron' 'c9acefa4-8ecf-49e0-982d-fe5f392461b3|2055981c-eb41-4060-9ea3-c4f5d6e24792|Ashley'; do USER=$(echo $B | cut -d'|' -f1); CAT=$(echo $B | cut -d'|' -f2); NAME=$(echo $B | cut -d'|' -f3); echo "--- $NAME ---"; RESP=$(curl -sS -w "\n__HTTP__:%{http_code}" -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/$USER/teamwork/installedApps" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d "{\"teamsApp@odata.bind\":\"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CAT\"}"); CODE=$(echo "$RESP" | grep -o '__HTTP__:[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); echo "  HTTP=$CODE"; if [ "$CODE" = "201" ] || [ "$CODE" = "200" ]; then echo "  >>> SUCCESS — deleting catalog $CAT"; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w "  catalog DELETE HTTP=%{http_code}\n" -X DELETE "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/$CAT" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"; else echo "$RESP" | grep -v '__HTTP__' | head -c 300; echo; fi; done
